series_metadata.series_description: This series contains Family & Medical Leave Act records with all pertinent information concerning FMLA requests filed by employee/supervisors of ODOT

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain scanned images for two years after seperation. ; Paper: Retain in active area until employee seperates from ODOT, then scan. Destroy paper docuemtns after scanned images have been checked for accuracy and completeness., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
